verses.text_hebrew: וּמִקְנֶ֣ה ׀ רַ֗ב הָיָ֞ה לִבְנֵ֧י רְאוּבֵ֛ן וְלִבְנֵי־גָ֖ד עָצ֣וּם מְאֹ֑ד וַיִּרְא֞וּ אֶת־אֶ֤רֶץ יַעְזֵר֙ וְאֶת־אֶ֣רֶץ גִּלְעָ֔ד וְהִנֵּ֥ה הַמָּק֖וֹם מְק֥וֹם מִקְנֶֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: Now the children of Reuben and the children of Gad had a very great multitude of cattle: and when they saw the land of Jazer, and the land of Gilead, that, behold, the place was a place for cattle;
verses.rendering: Now the children of Reuben and the children of Gad had a very great multitude of cattle: and when they saw the land of Jazer, and the land of Gilead, that, behold, the place was a place for cattle;
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיָּבֹ֥אוּ בְנֵֽי־גָ֖ד וּבְנֵ֣י רְאוּבֵ֑ן וַיֹּאמְר֤וּ אֶל־מֹשֶׁה֙ וְאֶל־אֶלְעָזָ֣ר הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְאֶל־נְשִׂיאֵ֥י הָעֵדָ֖ה לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.text_kjv: The children of Gad and the children of Reuben came and spake unto Moses, and to Eleazar the priest, and unto the princes of the congregation, saying,
verses.rendering: The children of Gad and the children of Reuben came and spoke to Moses, and to Eleazar the priest, and to the princes of the congregation, saying,
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: עֲטָר֤וֹת וְדִיבֹן֙ וְיַעְזֵ֣ר וְנִמְרָ֔ה וְחֶשְׁבּ֖וֹן וְאֶלְעָלֵ֑ה וּשְׂבָ֥ם וּנְב֖וֹ וּבְעֹֽן׃
verses.text_kjv: Ataroth, and Dibon, and Jazer, and Nimrah, and Heshbon, and Elealeh, and Shebam, and Nebo, and Beon,
verses.rendering: Ataroth, and Dibon, and Jazer, and Nimrah, and Heshbon, and Elealeh, and Shebam, and Nebo, and Beon,
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: הָאָ֗רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֨ר הִכָּ֤ה יְהֹוָה֙ לִפְנֵי֙ עֲדַ֣ת יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֶ֥רֶץ מִקְנֶ֖ה הִ֑וא וְלַֽעֲבָדֶ֖יךָ מִקְנֶֽה׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: Even the country which the LORD smote before the congregation of Israel, is a land for cattle, and thy servants have cattle:
verses.rendering: Even the country which the LORD smote before the congregation of Israel, is a land for cattle, and your servants have cattle:
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיֹּאמְר֗וּ אִם־מָצָ֤אנוּ חֵן֙ בְּעֵינֶ֔יךָ יֻתַּ֞ן אֶת־הָאָ֧רֶץ הַזֹּ֛את לַעֲבָדֶ֖יךָ לַאֲחֻזָּ֑ה אַל־תַּעֲבִרֵ֖נוּ אֶת־הַיַּרְדֵּֽן׃
verses.text_kjv: Wherefore, said they, if we have found grace in thy sight, let this land be given unto thy servants for a possession, and bring us not over Jordan.
verses.rendering: Wherefore, said they, if we have found grace in your sight, let this land be given to your servants for a possession, and bring us not over Jordan.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר מֹשֶׁ֔ה לִבְנֵי־גָ֖ד וְלִבְנֵ֣י רְאוּבֵ֑ן הַאַֽחֵיכֶ֗ם יָבֹ֙אוּ֙ לַמִּלְחָמָ֔ה וְאַתֶּ֖ם תֵּ֥שְׁבוּ פֹֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: And Moses said unto the children of Gad and to the children of Reuben, Shall your brethren go to war, and shall ye sit here?
verses.rendering: Moses said to the children of Gad and to the children of Reuben, Shall your brethren go to war, and shall you sit here?
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְלָ֣מָּה (תנואון) [תְנִיא֔וּן] אֶת־לֵ֖ב בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מֵֽעֲבֹר֙ אֶל־הָאָ֔רֶץ אֲשֶׁר־נָתַ֥ן לָהֶ֖ם יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: And wherefore discourage ye the heart of the children of Israel from going over into the land which the LORD hath given them?
verses.rendering: wherefore discourage you the heart of the children of Israel from going over into the land which the LORD has given them?
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: כֹּ֥ה עָשׂ֖וּ אֲבֹתֵיכֶ֑ם בְּשׇׁלְחִ֥י אֹתָ֛ם מִקָּדֵ֥שׁ בַּרְנֵ֖עַ לִרְא֥וֹת אֶת־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.text_kjv: Thus did your fathers, when I sent them from Kadesh-barnea to see the land.
verses.rendering: Thus did your fathers, when I sent them from Kadesh-barnea to see the land.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַֽיַּעֲל֞וּ עַד־נַ֣חַל אֶשְׁכּ֗וֹל וַיִּרְאוּ֙ אֶת־הָאָ֔רֶץ וַיָּנִ֕יאוּ אֶת־לֵ֖ב בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל לְבִלְתִּי־בֹא֙ אֶל־הָאָ֔רֶץ אֲשֶׁר־נָתַ֥ן לָהֶ֖ם יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: For when they went up unto the valley of Eshcol, and saw the land, they discouraged the heart of the children of Israel, that they should not go into the land which the LORD had given them.
verses.rendering: For when they went up to the valley of Eshcol, and saw the land, they discouraged the heart of the children of Israel, that they should not go into the land which the LORD had given them.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּֽחַר־אַ֥ף יְהֹוָ֖ה בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֑וּא וַיִּשָּׁבַ֖ע לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.text_kjv: And the LORD’S anger was kindled the same time, and he sware, saying,
verses.rendering: the LORD’S anger was kindled the same time, and he sware, saying,
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: אִם־יִרְא֨וּ הָאֲנָשִׁ֜ים הָעֹלִ֣ים מִמִּצְרַ֗יִם מִבֶּ֨ן עֶשְׂרִ֤ים שָׁנָה֙ וָמַ֔עְלָה אֵ֚ת הָאֲדָמָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר נִשְׁבַּ֛עְתִּי לְאַבְרָהָ֥ם לְיִצְחָ֖ק וּֽלְיַעֲקֹ֑ב כִּ֥י לֹא־מִלְא֖וּ אַחֲרָֽי׃
verses.text_kjv: Surely none of the men that came up out of Egypt, from twenty years old and upward, shall see the land which I sware unto Abraham, unto Isaac, and unto Jacob; because they have not wholly followed me:
verses.rendering: Surely none of the men that came up out of Egypt, from twenty years old and upward, shall see the land which I sware to Abraham, to Isaac, and to Jacob; because they have not wholly followed me:
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: בִּלְתִּ֞י כָּלֵ֤ב בֶּן־יְפֻנֶּה֙ הַקְּנִזִּ֔י וִיהוֹשֻׁ֖עַ בִּן־נ֑וּן כִּ֥י מִלְא֖וּ אַחֲרֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: Save Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenezite, and Joshua the son of Nun: for they have wholly followed the LORD.
verses.rendering: Save Caleb the son of Jephunneh the Kenezite, and Joshua the son of Nun: for they have wholly followed the LORD.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּֽחַר־אַ֤ף יְהֹוָה֙ בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וַיְנִעֵם֙ בַּמִּדְבָּ֔ר אַרְבָּעִ֖ים שָׁנָ֑ה עַד־תֹּם֙ כׇּל־הַדּ֔וֹר הָעֹשֶׂ֥ה הָרַ֖ע בְּעֵינֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: And the LORD’S anger was kindled against Israel, and he made them wander in the wilderness forty years, until all the generation, that had done evil in the sight of the LORD, was consumed.
verses.rendering: the LORD’S anger was kindled against Israel, and he made them wander in the wilderness forty years, until all the generation, that had done evil in the sight of the LORD, was consumed.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְהִנֵּ֣ה קַמְתֶּ֗ם תַּ֚חַת אֲבֹ֣תֵיכֶ֔ם תַּרְבּ֖וּת אֲנָשִׁ֣ים חַטָּאִ֑ים לִסְפּ֣וֹת ע֗וֹד עַ֛ל חֲר֥וֹן אַף־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.text_kjv: And, behold, ye are risen up in your fathers’ stead, an increase of sinful men, to augment yet the fierce anger of the LORD toward Israel.
verses.rendering: And, behold, you are risen up in your fathers’ stead, an increase of sinful men, to augment yet the fierce anger of the LORD toward Israel.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: כִּ֤י תְשׁוּבֻן֙ מֵֽאַחֲרָ֔יו וְיָסַ֣ף ע֔וֹד לְהַנִּיח֖וֹ בַּמִּדְבָּ֑ר וְשִֽׁחַתֶּ֖ם לְכׇל־הָעָ֥ם הַזֶּֽה׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: For if ye turn away from after him, he will yet again leave them in the wilderness; and ye shall destroy all this people.
verses.rendering: For if you turn away from after him, he will yet again leave them in the wilderness; and you shall destroy all this people.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּגְּשׁ֤וּ אֵלָיו֙ וַיֹּ֣אמְר֔וּ גִּדְרֹ֥ת צֹ֛אן נִבְנֶ֥ה לְמִקְנֵ֖נוּ פֹּ֑ה וְעָרִ֖ים לְטַפֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.text_kjv: And they came near unto him, and said, We will build sheepfolds here for our cattle, and cities for our little ones:
verses.rendering: they came near to him, and said, We will build sheepfolds here for our cattle, and cities for our little ones:
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַאֲנַ֜חְנוּ נֵחָלֵ֣ץ חֻשִׁ֗ים לִפְנֵי֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל עַ֛ד אֲשֶׁ֥ר אִם־הֲבִֽיאֹנֻ֖ם אֶל־מְקוֹמָ֑ם וְיָשַׁ֤ב טַפֵּ֙נוּ֙ בְּעָרֵ֣י הַמִּבְצָ֔ר מִפְּנֵ֖י יֹשְׁבֵ֥י הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.text_kjv: But we ourselves will go ready armed before the children of Israel, until we have brought them unto their place: and our little ones shall dwell in the fenced cities because of the inhabitants of the land.
verses.rendering: But we ourselves will go ready armed before the children of Israel, until we have brought them to their place: and our little ones shall dwell in the fenced cities because of the inhabitants of the land.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: לֹ֥א נָשׁ֖וּב אֶל־בָּתֵּ֑ינוּ עַ֗ד הִתְנַחֵל֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אִ֖ישׁ נַחֲלָתֽוֹ׃
verses.text_kjv: We will not return unto our houses, until the children of Israel have inherited every man his inheritance.
verses.rendering: We will not return to our houses, until the children of Israel have inherited every man his inheritance.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: כִּ֣י לֹ֤א נִנְחַל֙ אִתָּ֔ם מֵעֵ֥בֶר לַיַּרְדֵּ֖ן וָהָ֑לְאָה כִּ֣י בָ֤אָה נַחֲלָתֵ֙נוּ֙ אֵלֵ֔ינוּ מֵעֵ֥בֶר הַיַּרְדֵּ֖ן מִזְרָֽחָה׃ {פ}
verses.text_kjv: For we will not inherit with them on yonder side Jordan, or forward; because our inheritance is fallen to us on this side Jordan eastward.
verses.rendering: For we will not inherit with them on yonder side Jordan, or forward; because our inheritance is fallen to us on this side Jordan eastward.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר אֲלֵיהֶם֙ מֹשֶׁ֔ה אִֽם־תַּעֲשׂ֖וּן אֶת־הַדָּבָ֣ר הַזֶּ֑ה אִם־תֵּחָ֥לְצ֛וּ לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה לַמִּלְחָמָֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: And Moses said unto them, If ye will do this thing, if ye will go armed before the LORD to war,
verses.rendering: Moses said to them, If you will do this thing, if you will go armed before the LORD to war,
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְעָבַ֨ר לָכֶ֧ם כׇּל־חָל֛וּץ אֶת־הַיַּרְדֵּ֖ן לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה עַ֧ד הוֹרִישׁ֛וֹ אֶת־אֹיְבָ֖יו מִפָּנָֽיו׃
verses.text_kjv: And will go all of you armed over Jordan before the LORD, until he hath driven out his enemies from before him,
verses.rendering: will go all of you armed over Jordan before the LORD, until he has driven out his enemies from before him,
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְנִכְבְּשָׁ֨ה הָאָ֜רֶץ לִפְנֵ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ וְאַחַ֣ר תָּשֻׁ֔בוּ וִהְיִיתֶ֧ם נְקִיִּ֛ם מֵיְהֹוָ֖ה וּמִיִּשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְ֠הָיְתָ֠ה הָאָ֨רֶץ הַזֹּ֥את לָכֶ֛ם לַאֲחֻזָּ֖ה לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: And the land be subdued before the LORD: then afterward ye shall return, and be guiltless before the LORD, and before Israel; and this land shall be your possession before the LORD.
verses.rendering: the land be subdued before the LORD: then afterward you shall return, and be guiltless before the LORD, and before Israel; and this land shall be your possession before the LORD.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְאִם־לֹ֤א תַעֲשׂוּן֙ כֵּ֔ן הִנֵּ֥ה חֲטָאתֶ֖ם לַיהֹוָ֑ה וּדְעוּ֙ חַטַּאתְכֶ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר תִּמְצָ֖א אֶתְכֶֽם׃
verses.text_kjv: But if ye will not do so, behold, ye have sinned against the LORD: and be sure your sin will find you out.
verses.rendering: But if you will not do so, behold, you have sinned against the LORD: and be sure your sin will find you out.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: בְּנֽוּ־לָכֶ֤ם עָרִים֙ לְטַפְּכֶ֔ם וּגְדֵרֹ֖ת לְצֹנַאֲכֶ֑ם וְהַיֹּצֵ֥א מִפִּיכֶ֖ם תַּעֲשֽׂוּ׃
verses.text_kjv: Build you cities for your little ones, and folds for your sheep; and do that which hath proceeded out of your mouth.
verses.rendering: Build you cities for your little ones, and folds for your sheep; and do that which has proceeded out of your mouth.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר בְּנֵי־גָד֙ וּבְנֵ֣י רְאוּבֵ֔ן אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֖ה לֵאמֹ֑ר עֲבָדֶ֣יךָ יַעֲשׂ֔וּ כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר אֲדֹנִ֖י מְצַוֶּֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: And the children of Gad and the children of Reuben spake unto Moses, saying, Thy servants will do as my lord commandeth.
verses.rendering: the children of Gad and the children of Reuben spoke to Moses, saying, Thy servants will do as my lord commandeth.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: טַפֵּ֣נוּ נָשֵׁ֔ינוּ מִקְנֵ֖נוּ וְכׇל־בְּהֶמְתֵּ֑נוּ יִֽהְיוּ־שָׁ֖ם בְּעָרֵ֥י הַגִּלְעָֽד׃
verses.text_kjv: Our little ones, our wives, our flocks, and all our cattle, shall be there in the cities of Gilead:
verses.rendering: Our little ones, our wives, our flocks, and all our cattle, shall be there in the cities of Gilead:
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַעֲבָדֶ֨יךָ יַֽעַבְר֜וּ כׇּל־חֲל֥וּץ צָבָ֛א לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה לַמִּלְחָמָ֑ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר אֲדֹנִ֖י דֹּבֵֽר׃
verses.text_kjv: But thy servants will pass over, every man armed for war, before the LORD to battle, as my lord saith.
verses.rendering: But your servants will pass over, every man armed for war, before the LORD to battle, as my lord says.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיְצַ֤ו לָהֶם֙ מֹשֶׁ֔ה אֵ֚ת אֶלְעָזָ֣ר הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְאֵ֖ת יְהוֹשֻׁ֣עַ בִּן־נ֑וּן וְאֶת־רָאשֵׁ֛י אֲב֥וֹת הַמַּטּ֖וֹת לִבְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.text_kjv: So concerning them Moses commanded Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the chief fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel:
verses.rendering: So concerning them Moses commanded Eleazar the priest, and Joshua the son of Nun, and the chief fathers of the tribes of the children of Israel:
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר מֹשֶׁ֜ה אֲלֵהֶ֗ם אִם־יַעַבְר֣וּ בְנֵי־גָ֣ד וּבְנֵי־רְאוּבֵ֣ן ׀ אִ֠תְּכֶ֠ם אֶֽת־הַיַּרְדֵּ֞ן כׇּל־חָל֤וּץ לַמִּלְחָמָה֙ לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה וְנִכְבְּשָׁ֥ה הָאָ֖רֶץ לִפְנֵיכֶ֑ם וּנְתַתֶּ֥ם לָהֶ֛ם אֶת־אֶ֥רֶץ הַגִּלְעָ֖ד לַאֲחֻזָּֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: And Moses said unto them, If the children of Gad and the children of Reuben will pass with you over Jordan, every man armed to battle, before the LORD, and the land shall be subdued before you; then ye shall give them the land of Gilead for a possession:
verses.rendering: Moses said to them, If the children of Gad and the children of Reuben will pass with you over Jordan, every man armed to battle, before the LORD, and the land shall be subdued before you; then you shall give them the land of Gilead for a possession:
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְאִם־לֹ֧א יַֽעַבְר֛וּ חֲלוּצִ֖ים אִתְּכֶ֑ם וְנֹֽאחֲז֥וּ בְתֹכְכֶ֖ם בְּאֶ֥רֶץ כְּנָֽעַן׃
verses.text_kjv: But if they will not pass over with you armed, they shall have possessions among you in the land of Canaan.
verses.rendering: But if they will not pass over with you armed, they shall have possessions among you in the land of Canaan.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיַּֽעֲנ֧וּ בְנֵי־גָ֛ד וּבְנֵ֥י רְאוּבֵ֖ן לֵאמֹ֑ר אֵת֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר דִּבֶּ֧ר יְהֹוָ֛ה אֶל־עֲבָדֶ֖יךָ כֵּ֥ן נַעֲשֶֽׂה׃
verses.text_kjv: And the children of Gad and the children of Reuben answered, saying, As the LORD hath said unto thy servants, so will we do.
verses.rendering: the children of Gad and the children of Reuben answered, saying, As the LORD has said to your servants, so will we do.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: נַ֣חְנוּ נַעֲבֹ֧ר חֲלוּצִ֛ים לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶ֣רֶץ כְּנָ֑עַן וְאִתָּ֙נוּ֙ אֲחֻזַּ֣ת נַחֲלָתֵ֔נוּ מֵעֵ֖בֶר לַיַּרְדֵּֽן׃
verses.text_kjv: We will pass over armed before the LORD into the land of Canaan, that the possession of our inheritance on this side Jordan may be ours.
verses.rendering: We will pass over armed before the LORD into the land of Canaan, that the possession of our inheritance on this side Jordan may be ours.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּתֵּ֣ן לָהֶ֣ם ׀ מֹשֶׁ֡ה לִבְנֵי־גָד֩ וְלִבְנֵ֨י רְאוּבֵ֜ן וְלַחֲצִ֣י ׀ שֵׁ֣בֶט ׀ מְנַשֶּׁ֣ה בֶן־יוֹסֵ֗ף אֶת־מַמְלֶ֙כֶת֙ סִיחֹן֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ הָֽאֱמֹרִ֔י וְאֶ֨ת־מַמְלֶ֔כֶת ע֖וֹג מֶ֣לֶךְ הַבָּשָׁ֑ן הָאָ֗רֶץ לְעָרֶ֙יהָ֙ בִּגְבֻלֹ֔ת עָרֵ֥י הָאָ֖רֶץ סָבִֽיב׃
verses.text_kjv: And Moses gave unto them, even to the children of Gad, and to the children of Reuben, and unto half the tribe of Manasseh the son of Joseph, the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites, and the kingdom of Og king of Bashan, the land, with the cities thereof in the coasts, even the cities of the country round about.
verses.rendering: Moses gave to them, even to the children of Gad, and to the children of Reuben, and to half the tribe of Manasseh the son of Joseph, the kingdom of Sihon king of the Amorites, and the kingdom of Og king of Bashan, the land, with the cities thereof in the coasts, even the cities of the country round about.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּבְנ֣וּ בְנֵי־גָ֔ד אֶת־דִּיבֹ֖ן וְאֶת־עֲטָרֹ֑ת וְאֵ֖ת עֲרֹעֵֽר׃
verses.text_kjv: And the children of Gad built Dibon, and Ataroth, and Aroer,
verses.rendering: the children of Gad built Dibon, and Ataroth, and Aroer,
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְאֶת־עַטְרֹ֥ת שׁוֹפָ֛ן וְאֶת־יַעְזֵ֖ר וְיׇגְבְּהָֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: And Atroth, Shophan, and Jaazer, and Jogbehah,
verses.rendering: Atroth, Shophan, and Jaazer, and Jogbehah,
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְאֶת־בֵּ֥ית נִמְרָ֖ה וְאֶת־בֵּ֣ית הָרָ֑ן עָרֵ֥י מִבְצָ֖ר וְגִדְרֹ֥ת צֹֽאן׃
verses.text_kjv: And Beth-nimrah, and Beth-haran, fenced cities: and folds for sheep.
verses.rendering: Beth-nimrah, and Beth-haran, fenced cities: and folds for sheep.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וּבְנֵ֤י רְאוּבֵן֙ בָּנ֔וּ אֶת־חֶשְׁבּ֖וֹן וְאֶת־אֶלְעָלֵ֑א וְאֵ֖ת קִרְיָתָֽיִם׃
verses.text_kjv: And the children of Reuben built Heshbon, and Elealeh, and Kirjathaim,
verses.rendering: the children of Reuben built Heshbon, and Elealeh, and Kirjathaim,
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְאֶת־נְב֞וֹ וְאֶת־בַּ֧עַל מְע֛וֹן מֽוּסַבֹּ֥ת שֵׁ֖ם וְאֶת־שִׂבְמָ֑ה וַיִּקְרְא֣וּ בְשֵׁמֹ֔ת אֶת־שְׁמ֥וֹת הֶעָרִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר בָּנֽוּ׃
verses.text_kjv: And Nebo, and Baal-meon, (their names being changed,) and Shibmah: and gave other names unto the cities which they builded.
verses.rendering: Nebo, and Baal-meon, (their names being changed,) and Shibmah: and gave other names to the cities which they builded.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיֵּ֨לְכ֜וּ בְּנֵ֨י מָכִ֧יר בֶּן־מְנַשֶּׁ֛ה גִּלְעָ֖דָה וַֽיִּלְכְּדֻ֑הָ וַיּ֖וֹרֶשׁ אֶת־הָאֱמֹרִ֥י אֲשֶׁר־בָּֽהּ׃
verses.text_kjv: And the children of Machir the son of Manasseh went to Gilead, and took it, and dispossessed the Amorite which was in it.
verses.rendering: the children of Machir the son of Manasseh went to Gilead, and took it, and dispossessed the Amorite which was in it.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וַיִּתֵּ֤ן מֹשֶׁה֙ אֶת־הַגִּלְעָ֔ד לְמָכִ֖יר בֶּן־מְנַשֶּׁ֑ה וַיֵּ֖שֶׁב בָּֽהּ׃
verses.text_kjv: And Moses gave Gilead unto Machir the son of Manasseh; and he dwelt therein.
verses.rendering: Moses gave Gilead to Machir the son of Manasseh; and he dwelt therein.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְיָאִ֤יר בֶּן־מְנַשֶּׁה֙ הָלַ֔ךְ וַיִּלְכֹּ֖ד אֶת־חַוֺּתֵיהֶ֑ם וַיִּקְרָ֥א אֶתְהֶ֖ן חַוֺּ֥ת יָאִֽיר׃
verses.text_kjv: And Jair the son of Manasseh went and took the small towns thereof, and called them Havoth-jair.
verses.rendering: Jair the son of Manasseh went and took the small towns thereof, and called them Havoth-jair.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְנֹ֣בַח הָלַ֔ךְ וַיִּלְכֹּ֥ד אֶת־קְנָ֖ת וְאֶת־בְּנֹתֶ֑יהָ וַיִּקְרָ֧א לָ֦הֿ נֹ֖בַח בִּשְׁמֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.text_kjv: And Nobah went and took Kenath, and the villages thereof, and called it Nobah, after his own name.
verses.rendering: Nobah went and took Kenath, and the villages thereof, and called it Nobah, after his own name.
translator_notes: Numbers narrative/census detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.
